scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tank-bot-battle/shared && npm run build --workspace @tank-bot-battle/api && npm run build --workspace @tank-bot-battle/web
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @tank-bot-battle/shared && npm run dev --workspace @tank-bot-battle/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @tank-bot-battle/shared && npm run dev --workspace @tank-bot-battle/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @tank-bot-battle/shared && npm run dev --workspace @tank-bot-battle/api
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @tank-bot-battle/shared && npm run test --workspace @tank-bot-battle/shared && npm run test --workspace @tank-bot-battle/api && npm run test --workspace @tank-bot-battle/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @tank-bot-battle/shared && npm run lint --workspace @tank-bot-battle/api && npm run lint --workspace @tank-bot-battle/web
